name: Spicy Red Bean Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups Chopped celery, cut into 1/2-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the Cayenne pepper, black pepper, bay leaves, and ground cumin in the center of a 6-inch square piece of cheesecloth.
2. Gather the edges together and tie securely with a heavy thread to form a spice ball.
3. Rinse the beans and add them to a large kettle with the spice ball, water, ham hock, salt, celery, onion, and garlic.
4. Heat to boiling, then reduce heat and simmer covered for 3-4 hours or until the beans are tender. Stir occasionally.
5. Just before serving, remove the spice ball.
6. Stir in Tabasco sauce and parsley.
